description: Style NoteA great lounge-wear option, this long dress from inaya is styled so beautifully that you'll be tempted to wear this even on casual occasions!Product DetailsBluish green long dress, has a grey panel at the shoulder and back chest, a V-neckline and a patch behind the neckline, short sleeves and a flared hemlineMaterial and Care100% viscoseMachine wash at 40 degrees in gentle cycleDo not bleachTumble dry
